From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Medals awarded to people who served in a particular British military campaign

**British campaign medals** are awarded to members of the British Armed Forces, Allied forces and civilians participating in specified military campaigns. Examples include the *Defence Medal*, for homeland defence in World War II, and the *Atlantic Star* for World War II sea service in the Atlantic.

## 18th century

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=British_campaign_medals&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: 18th century")]

## 20th century

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=British_campaign_medals&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: 20th century")]

### Pre World War I

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=British_campaign_medals&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Pre World War I")]

* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/8e/Third_China_War_Medal_BAR.svg/120px-Third_China_War_Medal_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Third_China_War_Medal_BAR.svg) [China War Medal (1900)](/wiki/China_War_Medal_(1900) "China War Medal (1900)")

* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/bd/Ribbon_-_Natal_Native_Rebellion_Medal.gif/120px-Ribbon_-_Natal_Native_Rebellion_Medal.gif)](/wiki/File:Ribbon_-_Natal_Native_Rebellion_Medal.gif) [Natal Native Rebellion Medal](/wiki/Natal_Native_Rebellion_Medal "Natal Native Rebellion Medal") (1906)

### World War I

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=British_campaign_medals&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: World War I")]

During [World War I](/wiki/World_War_I "World War I") (1914–1918) the following campaign medals were issued:[[1]](#cite_note-1)

* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/03/Ribbon_-_1914_Star_%26_Rosette.png/120px-Ribbon_-_1914_Star_%26_Rosette.png)](/wiki/File:Ribbon_-_1914_Star_%26_Rosette.png) [1914 Star](/wiki/1914_Star "1914 Star")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/da/Ribbon_-_1914_Star.png/120px-Ribbon_-_1914_Star.png)](/wiki/File:Ribbon_-_1914_Star.png) [1914–15 Star](/wiki/1914%E2%80%9315_Star "1914–15 Star")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/British_War_Medal_BAR.svg/120px-British_War_Medal_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:British_War_Medal_BAR.svg) [British War Medal](/wiki/British_War_Medal "British War Medal")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/be/Mercantile_Marine_War_Medal_BAR.svg/120px-Mercantile_Marine_War_Medal_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Mercantile_Marine_War_Medal_BAR.svg) [Mercantile Marine War Medal](/wiki/Mercantile_Marine_War_Medal "Mercantile Marine War Medal")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b6/World_War_I_Victory_Medal_ribbon.svg/120px-World_War_I_Victory_Medal_ribbon.svg.png)](/wiki/File:World_War_I_Victory_Medal_ribbon.svg) [Victory Medal](/wiki/Victory_Medal_(United_Kingdom) "Victory Medal (United Kingdom)")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/75/Territorial_Forces_War_Medal_BAR.svg/120px-Territorial_Forces_War_Medal_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Territorial_Forces_War_Medal_BAR.svg) [Territorial Force War Medal](/wiki/Territorial_Force_War_Medal "Territorial Force War Medal")

The most frequent combinations are "trios" of either the 1914 or 1914–15 Star, the British War Medal and Victory Medal; and "pairs" of the British War and Victory Medals, these generally for servicemen who joined the war after 1915.[[2]](#cite_note-2)
  
A [Memorial Plaque](/wiki/Memorial_Plaque_(medallion) "Memorial Plaque (medallion)") was issued to the next-of-kin of deceased service personnel.

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=British_campaign_medals&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Inter World War")]

* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c7/General_Service_Medal_1918_BAR.svg/120px-General_Service_Medal_1918_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:General_Service_Medal_1918_BAR.svg) [General Service Medal (1918)](/wiki/General_Service_Medal_(1918) "General Service Medal (1918)")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/7d/Naval_General_Service_Medal_1915_BAR.svg/120px-Naval_General_Service_Medal_1915_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Naval_General_Service_Medal_1915_BAR.svg) [Naval General Service Medal (1915)](/wiki/Naval_General_Service_Medal_(1915) "Naval General Service Medal (1915)")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/22/India_General_Service_Medal_1936_BAR.svg/120px-India_General_Service_Medal_1936_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:India_General_Service_Medal_1936_BAR.svg) [India General Service Medal (1936)](/wiki/India_General_Service_Medal_(1936) "India General Service Medal (1936)")

### World War II

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=British_campaign_medals&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: World War II")]

During [World War II](/wiki/World_War_II "World War II") (1939–1945) the following were issued (with authorised Clasp or Emblem (if awarded) in brackets)—the first eleven are listed in the authorised Order of Wearing:[[3]](#cite_note-oow-3)

* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/32/Ribbon_-_1939-45_Star.png/120px-Ribbon_-_1939-45_Star.png)](/wiki/File:Ribbon_-_1939-45_Star.png) [1939–1945 Star](/wiki/1939%E2%80%931945_Star "1939–1945 Star") (Battle of Britain *or* Bomber Command)
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/17/Ribbon_-_Atlantic_Star.png/120px-Ribbon_-_Atlantic_Star.png)](/wiki/File:Ribbon_-_Atlantic_Star.png) [Atlantic Star](/wiki/Atlantic_Star "Atlantic Star") (Air Crew Europe *or* France and Germany)
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/03/Arctic_Star_bar.png/120px-Arctic_Star_bar.png)](/wiki/File:Arctic_Star_bar.png) [Arctic Star](/wiki/Arctic_Star "Arctic Star")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/32/Ribbon_-_Air_Crew_Europe_Star.png/120px-Ribbon_-_Air_Crew_Europe_Star.png)](/wiki/File:Ribbon_-_Air_Crew_Europe_Star.png) [Air Crew Europe Star](/wiki/Air_Crew_Europe_Star "Air Crew Europe Star") (Atlantic *or* France and Germany)
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/db/Ribbon_-_Africa_Star.png/120px-Ribbon_-_Africa_Star.png)](/wiki/File:Ribbon_-_Africa_Star.png) [Africa Star](/wiki/Africa_Star "Africa Star") (8th Army *or* 1st Army *or* North Africa 1942–43)
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/10/Pacific_Star_BAR.svg/120px-Pacific_Star_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Pacific_Star_BAR.svg) [Pacific Star](/wiki/Pacific_Star "Pacific Star") (Pacific)
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1b/Ribbon_-_Burma_Star.png/120px-Ribbon_-_Burma_Star.png)](/wiki/File:Ribbon_-_Burma_Star.png) [Burma Star](/wiki/Burma_Star "Burma Star") (Burma)
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c6/Ribbon_-_Italy_Star.png/120px-Ribbon_-_Italy_Star.png)](/wiki/File:Ribbon_-_Italy_Star.png) [Italy Star](/wiki/Italy_Star "Italy Star")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e3/France_and_Germany_Star_BAR.svg/120px-France_and_Germany_Star_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:France_and_Germany_Star_BAR.svg) [France and Germany Star](/wiki/France_and_Germany_Star "France and Germany Star") (Atlantic)
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/4d/Defence_Medal_ribbon.png)](/wiki/File:Defence_Medal_ribbon.png) [Defence Medal](/wiki/Defence_Medal_(United_Kingdom) "Defence Medal (United Kingdom)") (Silver laurel leaves (King's Commendation for brave conduct; civil))
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/be/Canadian_Volunteer_Service_Medal_BAR.svg/120px-Canadian_Volunteer_Service_Medal_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Canadian_Volunteer_Service_Medal_BAR.svg) [Canadian Volunteer Service Medal](/wiki/Canadian_Volunteer_Service_Medal "Canadian Volunteer Service Medal") (Overseas *or* Dieppe *or* Hong Kong *or* Bomber Command)
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/aa/Newfoundland_Volunteer_War_Service_Medal_BAR.svg/120px-Newfoundland_Volunteer_War_Service_Medal_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Newfoundland_Volunteer_War_Service_Medal_BAR.svg) [Newfoundland Volunteer War Service Medal](/wiki/Newfoundland_Volunteer_War_Service_Medal "Newfoundland Volunteer War Service Medal")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/42/War_Medal_1939%E2%80%931945_%28UK%29_ribbon.png)](/wiki/File:War_Medal_1939%E2%80%931945_(UK)_ribbon.png) [War Medal 1939–1945](/wiki/War_Medal_1939%E2%80%931945 "War Medal 1939–1945") (Oak leaf)
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/db/Ribbon_-_Africa_Service_Medal.png/120px-Ribbon_-_Africa_Service_Medal.png)](/wiki/File:Ribbon_-_Africa_Service_Medal.png) [Africa Service Medal](/wiki/Africa_Service_Medal "Africa Service Medal")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/80/Ribbon_India_Service_Medal.png/120px-Ribbon_India_Service_Medal.png)](/wiki/File:Ribbon_India_Service_Medal.png) [India Service Medal](/wiki/India_Service_Medal "India Service Medal")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b2/New_Zealand_War_Service_Medal_1939-1945_BAR.svg/120px-New_Zealand_War_Service_Medal_1939-1945_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:New_Zealand_War_Service_Medal_1939-1945_BAR.svg) [New Zealand War Service Medal](/wiki/New_Zealand_War_Service_Medal "New Zealand War Service Medal")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e0/Southern_Rhodesia_Medal_for_War_Service_BAR.svg/120px-Southern_Rhodesia_Medal_for_War_Service_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Southern_Rhodesia_Medal_for_War_Service_BAR.svg) [Southern Rhodesia Medal for War Service](/wiki/Southern_Rhodesia_Medal_for_War_Service "Southern Rhodesia Medal for War Service")
* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c3/Australia_Service_Medal_1939-1945_BAR.svg/120px-Australia_Service_Medal_1939-1945_BAR.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Australia_Service_Medal_1939-1945_BAR.svg) [Australia Service Medal](/wiki/Australia_Service_Medal_1939%E2%80%9345 "Australia Service Medal 1939–45")
